step_rationale: Complement component produced in atherosclerotic plaques; marks inflammation and immune activation.
mechanism: C1QC expression marks plaque macrophage activation and complement-mediated inflammation contributing to atherosclerotic lesion progression.

references.title: Identification of novel biomarkers for atherosclerosis using single-cell RNA sequencing and machine learning.
references.journal: Mammalian genome : official journal of the International Mammalian Genome Society
